title: pulmonaria angustifolia
intro: Pulmonaria angustifolia, also known as lungwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The medicinal properties of Pulmonaria angustifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an expectorant, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and chest infections. The health benefits of lungwort include its potential to soothe sore throats, calm coughs, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory health. Pulmonaria angustifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make cough syrups and expectorants.
